# Zynbo App Icon

The official brand icon lives at `assets/icon/icon.png` (1254×1254 PNG, RGB).

**Do not edit this file.** All platform-specific icon sizes are generated automatically.

## How icons are generated

Configuration lives in `pubspec.yaml` under the `flutter_launcher_icons:` block.

To regenerate icons locally after changing `icon.png`:
```bash
cd zynbo
flutter pub get
dart run flutter_launcher_icons
```

This produces:

**Android** — replaces the default Flutter icon completely:
- `android/app/src/main/res/mipmap-mdpi/ic_launcher.png` (48×48)
- `android/app/src/main/res/mipmap-hdpi/ic_launcher.png` (72×72)
- `android/app/src/main/res/mipmap-xhdpi/ic_launcher.png` (96×96)
- `android/app/src/main/res/mipmap-xxhdpi/ic_launcher.png` (144×144)
- `android/app/src/main/res/mipmap-xxxhdpi/ic_launcher.png` (192×192)
- **Adaptive icons** (Android 8+): foreground + black background
  - `mipmap-anydpi-v26/ic_launcher.xml`
  - `drawable-*/ic_launcher_foreground.png`
  - `values/colors.xml` → `<color name="ic_launcher_background">#000000</color>`

**iOS** — replaces the default Flutter icon completely:
- `ios/Runner/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/` (all 15 required sizes — iPhone, iPad, App Store)

## CI

The GitHub Actions workflow (`.github/workflows/build-apk.yml`) runs `dart run flutter_launcher_icons` automatically before each APK build, so every shipped APK has the correct icon.

## Why the source is 1254×1254

`flutter_launcher_icons` downsamples for every output size. Starting from a high-resolution master (≥1024 px) gives crisp icons all the way down to 48 px mdpi. Don't replace this with a smaller image.
